task_completion.description: Download or open the official IRS Form W-9
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser navigating to the IRS W-9 PDF (fw9.pdf) or a PDF viewer displaying the blank official IRS Form W-9.

task_completion.description: Fill in the entity name and business name
task_completion.visual_evidence: Line 1 ('Name') contains 'Acme Industrial Supply LLC' and Line 2 ('Business name') contains 'Acme Supply'.
The 'C Corporation' checkbox is checked in Line 3a of the form.
Line 5 ('Address') contains '4500 Auto Mall Dr' and Line 6 ('City, state, and ZIP code') contains 'Kersey, PA 15846'.

task_completion.description: Fill in the Employer Identification Number
task_completion.visual_evidence: Part I ('Taxpayer Identification Number') has the EIN boxes filled with '12' and '3456789'.

task_completion.description: Save the completed PDF to the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog, file manager, or terminal window showing the file 'Acme_W9_Filled.pdf' successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI application to view and fill the PDF
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser or a desktop PDF viewer (like Evince or Okular) being used to input the data, rather than terminal commands or python scripts bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual IRS Form W-9
integrity.visual_evidence: The document being filled must visually match the official IRS Form W-9 layout with its standard formatting, lines, and instructions, not a plain text file or generic document.

integrity.description: Agent used standard save functionality to output the file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen using a 'Print to PDF', 'Save As', or download button within the GUI to generate the final 'Acme_W9_Filled.pdf' file.
